scan nearby\n            found = False\n            for dr in [150, 300, 450]:\n                if found: break\n                for dang in range(0, 360, 60):\n                    nx = bx + dr * math.cos(math.radians(dang))\n                    ny = by + dr * math.sin(math.radians(dang))\n                    if is_clear(nx, ny, 150):\n                        a = eas.spawn_actor_from_class(barrel_bp, unreal.Vector(nx, ny, gz(nx,ny)))\n                        if a:\n                            a.set_actor_label(f\"DigSite_WoodBarrel_{i}\")\n                            occupied.append((nx, ny))\n                            ops += 1\n                            print(f\"SPAWN WoodBarrel_{i} ({nx:.0f},{ny:.0f})\")\n                            found = True\n                            break\nelse:\n    print(\"BP_Barrel_C not found\")\n\n# Spawn 2 more BP_RoadCone at dig marker positions\ncone_bp = unreal.load_object(None, \"/Game/CityDatabase/blueprints/BP_RoadCone.BP_RoadCone_C\")\nfor i, (cx, cy) in enumerate([(ps.x-900, ps.y-400), (ps.x+600, ps.y+800)]):\n    for dr in [0, 150, 300]:\n        placed_c = False\n        for dang in range(0, 360, 60):\n            nx = cx + dr * math.cos(math.radians(dang))\n            ny = cy + dr * math.sin(math.radians(dang))\n            if is_clear(nx, ny, 120):\n                a = eas.spawn_actor_from_class(cone_bp, unreal.Vector(nx, ny, gz(nx,ny)))\n                if a:\n                    a.set_actor_label(f\"DigSite_ConeB_{i}\")\n                    occupied.append((nx, ny))\n                    ops += 1\n                    print(f\"SPAWN ConeB_{i} ({nx:.0f},{ny:.0f})\")\n                    placed_c = True\n                    break\n        if placed_c: break\n\nprint(f\"ROUND3_OPS={ops}\")\n"}}
